violations.text: Dairy chest cooler in prep area was observed in poor repair. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. -Ice build-up observed in dairy chest cooler. Ice shall be broken down to prevent blockage of cold air flow in unit. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
Light bulbs observed in poor repair located in the refrigerator prep area. No light bulbs in the refrigerator shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The walls in the kitchen prep area observed with chip paint. Walls shall be smooth, durable, nonabsorbent, easily cleanable. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the milk refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The gaskets of the milk chest cooler were observed in poor repair (covered with gray tape). New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
